mainBanner.title: Launch Smarter Campaigns. Reach Every Customer. Drive Real Growth.
mainBanner.description: Notify is the all-in-one CPaaS built for campaign management — empowering businesses to plan, execute, and optimize multi-channel campaigns across SMS, E-mail, Push Notifications, and Social messaging from a single, powerful platform.

about.title: The CPaaS Platform Built for Intelligent Campaign Management
about.description: Notify is a comprehensive Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS) purpose-built for end-to-end campaign management. From audience segmentation and campaign creation to delivery, tracking, and optimization — Notify gives businesses the complete toolkit to run high-performing campaigns across every channel. Whether you're sending targeted SMS promotions, automated email journeys, real-time push notifications, or interactive messages via WhatsApp Business and Telegram, Notify keeps all your campaigns connected under one intelligent platform. With segmentation, built-in analytics, and flexible automation, businesses using Notify see measurable improvements in engagement rates, customer retention, and revenue — campaign after campaign.

productOne.title: SMS
productOne.description: Run high-converting SMS campaigns that reach customers instantly, wherever they are. Notify's SMS campaign manager lets you segment audiences, schedule bulk sends, personalize every message, and track delivery and click-through rates in real time — ensuring every campaign drives measurable results.

productTwo.title: E-mail
productTwo.description: Design, automate, and optimize full-funnel email campaigns from a single dashboard. Notify's email campaign tools give you drag-and-drop builders, behavioral triggers, A/B testing, and advanced analytics — so you can send the right message to the right audience at the right time, every time.

productThree.title: Social
productThree.description: Expand your campaign reach to the social channels your customers trust most. Notify integrates with WhatsApp Business and Telegram to let you run interactive campaigns, broadcast promotions, automate responses, and engage in two-way conversations — turning social touchpoints into powerful campaign moments.

productFour.title: Push Notifications
productFour.description: Keep your audience engaged between campaigns with perfectly timed push notifications. Notify's push campaign engine supports rich media, deep links, behavioral segmentation, and smart scheduling — so you can re-engage users, recover abandoned journeys, and drive conversions with every notification sent.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the perfect plan for your business needs

partners.title: Partners
partners.description: Trusted by 20+ businesses across industries, Notify powers the campaign operations of brands that demand scale, precision, and performance. From startups launching their first campaigns to enterprises running omnichannel programs, our partners choose Notify to connect with customers and grow with confidence.
